summary: Correct the C7 browser refusal assertion and replace the incomplete mutation corpus with reproducibly seeded fuzzed whitespace coverage over every Appendix E fixture.
specSections: AC-7.b formatter idempotence over the fixture corpus and a fuzzed mutation set

decisions.decision: Generate four distinct whitespace mutations per Appendix E fixture from a stable fixture-specific seed, mask and restore strings and comments byte-for-byte, and require every mutation to normalize to the exact golden and remain idempotent on a second formatting pass.
decisions.rationale: The prior single replacement mutation excluded three fixtures and did not satisfy AC-7.b's fuzzed-set requirement. Stable seeds keep failures reproducible while multi-dimensional whitespace changes exercise every fixture without changing protected literal or comment contents.

decisions.decision: Locate the syntax-refusal status by its exact catalog text within the semantic status role instead of assuming the page has only one status region.
decisions.rationale: The workbench legitimately exposes engine, document, and editor-command status regions. Text-scoping preserves the accessibility assertion and selects the observable refusal without positional coupling.

testEvidence.criterion: Every Appendix E fixture participates in a reproducibly seeded, diverse mutation set whose exact output is idempotent
testEvidence.test: Run the focused formatter fixture file after first proving the old single-mutation corpus cannot satisfy the diversity contract.

red.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/application/formatting/openscad-formatter.test.ts -t "normalizes a deterministic mutation corpus back to the same goldens"
red.outcome: RED: 1 test failed and 17 were skipped; the diversity assertion expected 30 cases but the old excluded corpus produced only 12.

green.outcome: GREEN: 1 test file passed and 18 tests passed in 676 ms; all 15 fixtures produced four distinct seeded mutations, exact goldens, and second-pass idempotence.

testEvidence.criterion: The real browser formatter journey reports syntax refusal through the correct live status region
testEvidence.test: Run the focused C7 Playwright journey after reproducing the hosted cross-platform strict-locator failure.

red.command: GitHub Actions run 29463110142: Browser acceptance (ubuntu-latest) and Browser acceptance (windows-latest)
red.outcome: RED: both operating-system jobs failed the same assertion because getByRole('status') resolved to three legitimate regions; each lane otherwise passed 21 of 22 tests.

green.outcome: GREEN: 1 Playwright test passed in 7.1 seconds through the real Edit menu, valid formatting path, unchanged malformed source, and exact refusal notice.

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
